content.text:
Good question — thanks for checking.

I delegated to ACME/InsuranceAgent because "run the pricing" is a domain-specific, execution task that can create/update data. As Navigator I route those actions to the appropriate specialized agent so they can safely execute domain logic and return authoritative results.

What I sent the InsuranceAgent (summary):
- Run pricing for @Cornerstone/Tesla and @Cornerstone/Nestle
- Use existing pricings (prefer Draft/Quoted; otherwise most recent year)
- Do not create new pricings without asking
- Return a concise run summary (pricing path, id/year, status change, AggregatedTSI, TotalLocations, alerts/errors, actions taken)

Next steps:
- I can wait for the InsuranceAgent’s results and relay them, or
- If you want to change parameters (specific underwriting years, allow creating new pricings, etc.), tell me now and I’ll update the request.
